titles.title: Lord we Dedicate this temple to you

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: In the bible days your people built you a place And your glory shown upon it and you showed them your grace Now we're living still in the bible day continuing your plan So we ask you Lord, to fill this house and bless us once again

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Lord we dedicate this temple to you Send your fire upon the altar and make my heart true We will glorify you father in all that we do Lord we dedicate this temple to you

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Lord you said you'd build a temple not made by hands And you showed it very clearly Lord How it fits in your plan As we dedicate this temple now We dedicate our lives So all that is within you Lord Come poor into your bride
